# Membership Tiers

There are three membership tiers: Member, gold-tier, and platinum-tier. Member is free on registration and earns points at the standard rate. Gold requires NT$30,000 spent in the last 12 months and grants free shipping with no minimum plus double points during your birthday month. Platinum requires NT$100,000 spent in the last 12 months, includes all Gold benefits, and adds a free upgrade to express-delivery and a dedicated support line.

[Source: membership_points.md#membership-tiers]
